arts.ttl: I won two titles at Man City despite wanting to stay at Arsenal - they pushed me out
arts.sum: Former Manchester City defender Gael Clichy has opened up on the reasons behind his exit from Arsenal and why he felt the club no longer wanted him to stay in north London

arts.ttl: PL Predictions: Arsenal to expose wide open Man City
arts.sum: Our betting expert Jones Knows provides his insight as he looks forward to Super Sunday and is tipping Arsenal to beat Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta defends right to criticise referees after Gary Neville accusation
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta insists he has every right to criticise refereeing decisions he doesn't agree with - provided it's done respectfully - after Gary Neville claimed the Arsenal boss was inflaming situations

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola points finger over Erling Haaland treatment ahead of Arsenal showdown

arts.ttl: What Myles Lewis-Skelly has done at Arsenal which will alert Barcelona and Real Madrid
arts.sum: The news that Lewis-Skelly is learning Spanish could well alert La Liga giants Barcelona and Real Madrid to his services following a string of impressive performances for the Gunners this season. Myles Lewis-Skelly has already started doing one thing at Arsenal that will alert Spanish giants Barcelona and Real Madrid.
